creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2006-10-07 09:17:33 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel/upp            Makefile 
    devel/upp/files      patch-examples-SDLExample-SDLExample.upp 
  Added files:
    devel/upp/files      patch-uppsrc-Core-Core.upp 
                         patch-uppsrc-Draw-Draw.upp 
                         patch-uppsrc-Web-socket.cpp 
  Removed files:
    devel/upp/files      patch-examples-SDLExample-main.cpp 
  Log:
  - Added socket patch to fix (non-)blocking behaviour
  - Fixed a few library dependencies for upp packages
  - Changed SDL usage (to reflect recent change in devel/sdl12)
  
  PR:             ports/104030
  Submitted by:   Matthias Sund <m.sund@arcor.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.5       +2 -1      ports/devel/upp/Makefile
